description: Recursion-detection enrichment: is_recursive, recursion_count. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust source self-recursive functions (multiple files) plus C/C++ fixture recursive functions.

cases.name: recursion_in_cpp_fixture
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE is_recursive='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: recursion_count_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/query.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='match_segs' WHERE recursion_count=2 LIMIT 5

cases.name: recursion_in_show_rs
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/show.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE is_recursive='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: negative_no_recursion_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE is_recursive='true' LIMIT 5
